Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv\('data/processed/county_prop13.csv'\)
print\('Columns:', df.columns.tolist\(\)\)
print\(\)
at_100 = df[df['assessment_ratio'] >= 0.99]
print\(f'Counties with ratio >= 0.99: {len\(at_100\)}'\)
for _, r in at_100.sort_values\('assessment_ratio', ascending=False\).iterrows\(\):
    print\(f'  {r[\\"county\\"]:20s}  ratio={r[\\"assessment_ratio\\"]:.4f}'\)
print\(\)
print\(f'Full range: {df[\\"assessment_ratio\\"].min\(\):.4f} - {df[\\"assessment_ratio\\"].max\(\):.4f}'\)
print\(f'Counties at exactly 1.0: {\(df[\\"assessment_ratio\\"] == 1.0\).sum\(\)}'\)
" 2>&1)
